nasb.text: Then David came to Nob to Ahimelech the priest; and Ahimelech came trembling to meet David and said to him, “Why are you alone and no one with you?”

esv.text: Then David came to Nob, to Ahimelech the priest. And Ahimelech came to meet David, trembling, and said to him, “Why are you alone, and no one with you?”

cnv.text: 大衛到了挪伯祭司亞希米勒那裡，亞希米勒戰戰兢兢地迎接大衛，對他說：“你為甚麼獨自一人，沒有人跟隨你呢？”

ccb.text: 大卫来到挪伯的祭司亚希米勒那里。亚希米勒战战兢兢地出来迎接他，问道：“你为什么独自一人，没有随从呢？”
